related.name: ☉ Sun
related.teaser: The Sun is the eternal lamp — source of clarity, fire of spirit, nobility of heart.

related.name: NUMBERS
related.teaser: Monad is the point before all division — the radiant seed, the single flame from which the ten thousand things unfold.

related.name: Zephyrus
related.teaser: Heart is the vesica of the world — the overlap where differences become devotion.

related.name: XIX. The Sun
related.teaser: The Sun is pure illumination — radiant joy and vital force shining clarity into all things.

related.name: ᛊ Sowilo
related.teaser: Sowilo is sunlight made motion — the golden line through the maze.

related.name: ♇ Pluto
related.teaser: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows.

related.name: 🟡 Solar Plexus (Manipura)
related.teaser: Solar plexus is the furnace of power — fire of will, anger purified into radiance.

related.name: ♃ Jupiter
related.teaser: Jupiter is the thunder scepter — wheel of fate, king of sky, expansion of spirit.

related.name: Odin
related.teaser: Odin embodies sky, thunder, sovereignty — under Jupiter; in Leo, Sagittarius.

related.name: Mokosh
related.teaser: Mokosh embodies creation, cosmic order — under Sun · Jupiter; in Leo, Sagittarius.

related.name: Shiva
related.teaser: Shiva embodies creation, cosmic order — under Sun · Jupiter; in Leo, Sagittarius.

related.name: Nike
related.teaser: Nike embodies victory, triumph — under Jupiter; in Sagittarius.
